name: GOLFTEC Ballantyne
address: 15235 John J Delaney Dr Ste Q, Charlotte, NC 28277
about: GOLFTEC is a technology-driven golf instruction and training facility that offers personalized lessons, club fitting, and practice sessions using advanced motion measurement systems. The venue utilizes OPTIMOTION technology, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to provide data-driven feedback to golfers of all skill levels. Services include swing evaluations, on-course improvement lessons, and custom club fittings with access to equipment from top brands like Callaway and TaylorMade.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced motion capture technology for precise swing analysis
Personalized improvement plans with certified PGA coaches
Data-driven club fitting for optimized equipment performance
Indoor training bays with launch monitors and video feedback

faq.question: Do I need my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC provides all necessary equipment for lessons and fittings, though golfers are welcome to bring their own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring food or drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or beverages are permitted at GOLFTEC locations.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulator session take?
faq.answer: Standard 18-hole simulator sessions typically take 60-90 minutes depending on pace of play.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers junior programs and welcomes young golfers with age-appropriate instruction.
